title: Vietnamese Pork Com Bites
description: A savory and easy-to-make Vietnamese-inspired dish made with pork, com and tam.
instructions: Combine ground pork, rice flour, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
Mix well until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Using your hands, shape the pork mixture into small patties.
Fry the patties until golden brown and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
Garnish with additional tam if desired.
